description: How to Download Full MacOS Installer from Mac Command Line

How to use it as your website background Copy the entire code into a new .html file (e.g., index.html).  Replace the content inside the <div class="content"> with your own website elements (navigation, text, images, forms, etc.).  Adjust the overlay – you can remove the background-color: rgba(0,0,0,0.4) from .content if you prefer no dark overlay, or change the blur value.  Tweak the animation (speed, colors, line density) by editing the constants at the top of the <script>.  The canvas will stay fixed in the background, animating continuously, while your content scrolls over it. The z-index ensures the canvas stays behind everything else. Enjoy your living, slithering web background.
